violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the food prep area is lacking proper hand-washing signage. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Tomatoes were stacked too high in the cold hold wells and were observed held between 47-52 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC placed in walk-in cooler. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Working containers of dry and liquid ingredients are not labeled with the common name of the food. Working containers holding food or food ingredients that are removed from their original packages, such as flour, herbs, salt, sugar, and spices must be labeled with the common name of the food. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The door to the outside, located in the front, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 07/31/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and deli display unit have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and/or other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Food prep sink in the prep area is lacking an airgap. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Inspector observed an accumulation of trash and other debris around refuse area. Area to be maintained clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

Inspector observed trash receptacles in poor repair (broken and missing lids). Receptacles and waste handling units for refuse, recyclables, and returnables shall be kept covered. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025

The floors and walls throughout the facility have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Mops must be allowed to air dry after use. New Violation. Correct By: 07/17/2025
Condensation from deli display cooler was observed dripping onto uncovered deli meat.PIC informed and voluntarily disposed of product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the (food storage shelves) have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The outside refuse area observed with an accumulation of trash, litter, and/or other debris. Outside refuse areas should be kept clean as often as necessary to keep them cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024

The floors in back kitchen and walk in freezer area have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 09/30/2024
